title: Medici family mystery may be solved after more than 400 years
summary: 经过400多年，美第奇家族的谜团可能通过DNA分析得到解决。科学家利用现代基因组学技术，对美第奇家族成员的遗骸进行测序，发现他们可能死于疟疾。这一发现揭示了文艺复兴时期佛罗伦萨统治者的健康状况，并展示了DNA分析在历史研究中的应用。
summary_en: After more than 400 years, the Medici family mystery may be solved through DNA analysis. Scientists used modern genomics to sequence the remains of Medici family members, suggesting they may have died from malaria. This discovery sheds light on the health of Renaissance Florence rulers and demonstrates the application of DNA analysis in historical research.
